title: Suburban Diagnostics - Pathology, Cardiology & Radiology Services
description: Suburban Diagnostics is a leading diagnostics centre and pathology lab in west India equipped with the latest technologies. Serving in Mumbai, Pune & Goa.

Customer Testimonials Prioritising patient health since 1994. Previous Kajal Mehta Lullanagar, Pune Centre Team was very gentle for my blood collection. They explained me the packages very well which I was not aware about. Amee Patel I went for a blood test for my 3-year old child. The staff was very confident and down to earth. My child did not even come to know that something she was pricked in her vein. Anand R Their process is very streamlined. Got my RT-PCR report in 9 hours. They have SMS notifications for updates. Their staff in Vasai is very good too! Thank you. Prasad Muluk Mahavir Nagar Team helped me out with my blood tests. I must say the team was wonderful at their work, I didn’t even realize when the blood collection technician (Phlebotomist) drawed the required blood for all the tests. Mahavir Nagar Team is truly amazing and I am thankful for the service. Shivani Sailesh Sodah Khar Team was simply amazing and I did not feel the prick at all. The blood collection technician (Phlebotomist) was super skilled. It is the distinguished service like Suburban`s that makes a customer want to come back again. 10/10 for Khar Team. Vishesh Kriplani We visited the Juhu centre for follicular USG. Juhu Centre Team was very polite and patient in guiding us regarding the process.
